# Dakinis Landing

**Corporate website and acquisition funnel** for the Dakinis Systems ecosystem.

Production: [dakinissystems.com](https://dakinissystems.com)

---

## Purpose

- Brand and trust for the Dakinis Systems platform
- **One-first conversion**: Excel pain → Core BOS → signup
- Legal pages (ES/EN), analytics funnel (GA4 + Meta Pixel)
- Single CTA to [core.dakinissystems.com](https://core.dakinissystems.com)

This repo is **marketing**, not a platform service.

---

## Analytics funnel

`landing_page_view` → `cta_dakinis_one_clicked` → `core_page_view` → `signup_completed`

Tokens and events: `@dakinis/shared-brand/analytics`

---

- Core product: [dakinis-core](https://github.com/dakinissystems/dakinis-core)
